category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a versatile pairwise aligner for genomic and spliced nucleotide sequences.
source_facts.homepage is the official minimap2 documentation site under lh3.github.io.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use minimap2.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage points to lh3.github.io/minimap2, with the manual page at /minimap2.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lh3/minimap2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies genomic, spliced nucleotide sequence alignment context.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools minimap2 and sdust.
